_info: Settings applied to the Default User NTUSER.DAT hive by Set-DefaultUserRegistry.ps1. New user profiles inherit these values.
_notes: All paths are relative to the HKCU root (the hive root).
Integer values become REG_DWORD. String values become REG_SZ.
Fields prefixed with '_' are metadata and ignored by the script.
Only add settings that are traceable to official Microsoft documentation.

settings._description: Disable Windows Copilot via the policy-backed registry key. Prevents Copilot from launching and removes the taskbar icon for the user.
settings._note: Microsoft has marked TurnOffWindowsCopilot as a legacy policy subject to deprecation. Future Windows versions may require AppLocker rules. Still functional as of Win11 24H2.

settings._description: Hide the Copilot button from the taskbar. This is a UI-level change and does not disable Copilot functionality on its own — pair with the policy key above.
Align taskbar icons to the left instead of the Windows 11 default center alignment.
Set the search box on the taskbar to icon-only mode instead of the full search bar.
settings._values: 0 = Hidden, 1 = Icon only, 2 = Search box, 3 = Search button
